languages.original_text: "Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

languages.text: "Нунциус, лицезрел ли ты подобные шедевры зодчества доселе? Один их вид навевает на меня размышления о том, сколь могуч разум, способный создать подобное, и сколь искусны руки, что воплотили его мысль".

"Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус, лицезрел ли ты подобные шедевры зодчества доселе? Один их вид навевает на меня размышления о том, сколь могуч разум, способный создать подобное, и сколь искусны руки, что воплотили его мысль".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

"Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

"Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

languages.text: «Nuncius, ¿había visto alguna vez unas obras maestras arquitectónicas similares? Su mera imagen me hace maravillarme ante el poder de la mente que las concebió y la habilidad de las manos que ejecutaron su diseño».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius, ¿había visto alguna vez unas obras maestras arquitectónicas similares? Su mera imagen me hace maravillarme ante el poder de la mente que las concebió y la habilidad de las manos que ejecutaron su diseño».

languages.text: 「ヌンキウス、これほどの建築の傑作を、君はこれまで目にしたことがありますか？ それを目にするだけで、かくのごときものを構想しえた精神の偉大さと、その設計を実現した手の巧みさに、驚嘆せずにはいられません」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウス、これほどの建築の傑作を、君はこれまで目にしたことがありますか？ それを目にするだけで、かくのごときものを構想しえた精神の偉大さと、その設計を実現した手の巧みさに、驚嘆せずにはいられません」

languages.text: “努恩修斯，你见过这样的建筑杰作吗？仅仅是看到它，就让我惊叹于其构思者心智之伟大，其实现者双手之精巧。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯，你见过这样的建筑杰作吗？仅仅是看到它，就让我惊叹于其构思者心智之伟大，其实现者双手之精巧。”

languages.text: "Nuncius, habt Ihr schon einmal derartige architektonische Meisterwerke gesehen? Ich frage mich schon bei ihrem Anblick, wie mächtig ein Verstand sein muss, um so etwas zu ersinnen ... und wie geschickt die Hände, die den Plan umsetzen."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, habt Ihr schon einmal derartige architektonische Meisterwerke gesehen? Ich frage mich schon bei ihrem Anblick, wie mächtig ein Verstand sein muss, um so etwas zu ersinnen ... und wie geschickt die Hände, die den Plan umsetzen."

languages.text: « Nuncius, as-tu déjà vu pareils chefs-d'œuvre d'architecture ? Cette vision ne peut que susciter des questionnements sur l'esprit puissant qui a conçu de telles structures, et sur les mains habiles qui les ont bâties. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius, as-tu déjà vu pareils chefs-d'œuvre d'architecture ? Cette vision ne peut que susciter des questionnements sur l'esprit puissant qui a conçu de telles structures, et sur les mains habiles qui les ont bâties. »

languages.text: "Nuncius, daha önce böyle mimari şaheserler görmüş müydün? Görmek bile böyle bir şeyi düşünebilen zihnin kudreti ve tasarımını gerçekleştiren ellerin becerisi karşısında hayrete düşmeme neden oluyor."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, have you ever seen such masterpieces of architecture before? The mere sight makes me wonder at the mightiness of the mind that could conceive of such a thing, and the skilfulness of the hands that realised its design."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, daha önce böyle mimari şaheserler görmüş müydün? Görmek bile böyle bir şeyi düşünebilen zihnin kudreti ve tasarımını gerçekleştiren ellerin becerisi karşısında hayrete düşmeme neden oluyor."
